title: RHI Game UI Renderer Conversion
principle: Game-facing HUD, inventory, shop, cursor, health bars, damage text must move to RHI/UI renderer. ImGui remains only for editor, profiler, tuner, inspector, and debug panels.

currentFinding.imguiReason: Existing CUI_Manager was implemented with ImGui draw lists, so previous fast plans followed the existing path.
currentFinding.correction: For final LoL-style UI, the rendering path should be RHI sprite/font rendering, not ImGui.
currentFinding.existingRHIConstraint: CRHIFxSpriteRenderer currently targets DX12 frame command list; Debug DX11 runtime needs a DX11-native UI renderer behind IRHIDevice.

implementationRules.rule: Do not render production gameplay UI with ImGui.
disallowed: ImGui text for final damage font

implementationRules.rule: ImGui is allowed only for debug and authoring surfaces.
UI renderer reads prepared UI draw commands or ECS components; gameplay state changes go through GameCommand or Shared/GameSim systems.
Atlas images are rendered by texture SRV plus normalized UV rect. Do not pre-cut PNGs unless atlas rects become unmaintainable.
Text must move to Font Manager / SDF or BMFont RHI rendering. Until then, text-only leftovers are temporary migration debt.

phases.name: Renderer Foundation
scope: Filled rect and rect border draw
Alpha blend, depth disabled, cull none, clamp sampler

phases.name: First Migration
scope: Champion-attached HP bars render through CUIRenderer
Mouse cursor renders through CUIRenderer after ImGui debug draw
Existing ImGui health bar path remains fallback only

phases.name: HUD Atlas Migration
scope: Move Draw_ChampionHUD atlas pieces and filled rects from ImDrawList to CUIRenderer
Keep only temporary text labels until Font Manager lands
Split HUD layout from rendering calls

phases.name: Font Manager
scope: BMFont or SDF font atlas loader

phases.name: Inventory And Shop Panels
scope: P shop and I inventory panel rendered by RHI UI

phases.name: Remove Game UI ImGui Debt
scope: Remove ImDrawList from production HUD paths

build.command: MSBuild Engine/Include/Engine.vcxproj Client/Include/Client.vcxproj Server/Include/Server.vcxproj Debug x64
build.note: Run all three after each RHI UI phase because EngineSDK header copy affects Client.
